properties.sql: WITH per_programme AS (SELECT vch.c_programme_code AS programme_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, vch.c_programme_code) AS programme_name, COALESCE(env.c_code, '—') AS envelope_code, COALESCE(proj.allocated, 0) AS allocated_num, COALESCE(proj.committed, 0) AS committed_num, COALESCE(proj.expensed, 0) AS expensed_num, COUNT(*) AS issued_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'redeemed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS redeemed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'partially_redeemed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partial_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'issued' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'expired' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_count, 1 AS sort_order FROM app_fd_im_voucher vch LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = vch.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_programme_code = vch.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN budget_projection proj ON proj.envelope_code = env.c_code GROUP BY vch.c_programme_code, reg.c_name, env.c_code, proj.allocated, proj.committed, proj.expensed), totals AS (SELECT 'TOTAL' AS programme_code, '— TOTAL (all programmes) —' AS programme_name, '' AS envelope_code, SUM(allocated_num) AS allocated_num, SUM(committed_num) AS committed_num, SUM(expensed_num) AS expensed_num, SUM(issued_count) AS issued_count, SUM(redeemed_count) AS redeemed_count, SUM(partial_count) AS partial_count, SUM(active_count) AS active_count, SUM(expired_count) AS expired_count, SUM(cancelled_count) AS cancelled_count, 2 AS sort_order FROM per_programme), unioned AS (SELECT * FROM per_programme UNION ALL SELECT * FROM totals) SELECT programme_code, programme_name, envelope_code, issued_count AS vouchers_issued, redeemed_count AS vouchers_redeemed, partial_count AS vouchers_partial, active_count AS vouchers_active, expired_count AS vouchers_expired, cancelled_count AS vouchers_cancelled, ROUND((redeemed_count * 100.0) / NULLIF(issued_count, 0), 1) || '%' AS redemption_pct, to_char(allocated_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS budget_allocated, to_char(committed_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS budget_committed, to_char(expensed_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS budget_expensed, to_char(allocated_num - committed_num - expensed_num, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS budget_remaining, COALESCE(ROUND((expensed_num * 100.0) / NULLIF(allocated_num, 0), 1) || '%', '—') AS budget_used_pct FROM unioned ORDER BY sort_order, programme_code
